title: Coin Operated Water ATM with Bottle Dispenser
description: Coin-operated water vending unit accepting ₹1/₹2/₹5 coins, dispensing metered volumes (250 mL/500 mL/1 L) via peristaltic pump with YF-S201 flow sensor accuracy and LCD display.
objective: Accept 3 coin denominations; dispense 250 mL, 500 mL, 1 L accurately (±2%); bottle presence sensor; LCD status display; coin change reject.
constraints: 12 V DC; peristaltic pump 1 L/min; BOM < ₹3500; food-safe silicone tubing.
design_element_titles: Water ATM — Coin-Triggered Flow Pump Dispenser
Coin Acceptor + Solenoid Dispenser Vending Mechanism

element_usage_notes.Water ATM — Coin-Triggered Flow Pump Dis: YF-S201 flow sensor (450 pulses/L) measures exact volume; solenoid NC valve safety cutoff.
element_usage_notes.12 V Peristaltic Pump Liquid Dispenser: Food-safe silicone tube; self-priming; 1 L/min at 12 V.
